description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring five evenly spaced drawers on the front. Each drawer has a recessed handle integrated into the top edge, allowing for easy grip and pull. The cabinet is constructed from a smooth, metallic material with a matte gray finish, giving it a sturdy and professional appearance. The top surface is flat and features parallel black slats, possibly for ventilation or aesthetic detail. The sides and back are plain, with no visible handles or openings, emphasizing its utilitarian function. This type of cabinet is commonly found in office environments for organized document storage.
description: A tall, matte gray filing cabinet with five drawers and recessed handles, featuring a flat top with black slats.
description_view_0: Front view showing five drawers with recessed handles and the slatted top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid panel and the slatted top, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the parallel black slats across the flat surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing a plain panel and the slatted top.
